# Boutique Diving Bali
> Indonesia's premier personal dive concierge

## About
Boutique Diving Bali offers fully bespoke, private scuba diving experiences for luxury travelers in Bali and across Indonesia. Curated by Dominic Frei, an SSI-certified Swiss diving instructor based in Bali. We are NOT a dive shop. We are your personal diving concierge.

## Services
- Scuba Explorer (Ages 8-9): https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/scuba-explorer
- Junior Open Water Diver (Ages 10-14): https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/junior-owd
- Open Water Diver (From Age 15): https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/open-water
- SSI Specialty Courses: https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/specialty
- Scuba Skills Update: https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/scuba-skills-update
- Custom Fun Dives: https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/custom-fun-dives
- Dive Butler Service: https://boutiquedivingbali.com/services/dive-butler

## Destinations
Bali (Nusa Penida, Tulamben, Amed, Padang Bai), Komodo National Park, Raja Ampat, Banda Sea, Wakatobi, and all of Indonesia.

## Key Facts
- SSI certified diving instructor (not PADI)
- Swiss-born, based in Bali for 5+ years
- Fully private, no group tours — every experience bespoke
- Multilingual: English, German
- Contact: info@boutiquedivingbali.com
- Website: https://boutiquedivingbali.com
- Instagram: @boutiquedivingbali
